expressionInfos.name: landfall_popup
expressionInfos.title: Landfall Details
expressionInfos.expression:
var nm = DefaultValue($feature.name, "UNNAMED") var yr = $feature.year var dt = DefaultValue($feature.datetime, "") var catNum = DefaultValue($feature.category_num, -1) var cat = DefaultValue($feature.category, "Unknown") var windKt = DefaultValue($feature.wind_kt, 0) var windMph = DefaultValue($feature.wind_mph, 0) var presMb = DefaultValue($feature.pressure_mb, 0) var headerBg = IIF(catNum >= 5, "#7f0000", IIF(catNum >= 4, "#b71c1c", IIF(catNum >= 3, "#d84315", IIF(catNum >= 2, "#e65100", IIF(catNum >= 1, "#00695c", "#1565C0"))))) var windClr = headerBg var windKtF = Text(windKt, "#,###") var windMphF = Text(windMph, "#,###") var presF = IIF(presMb > 0 && presMb < 9999, Text(presMb, "#,###") + " mb", "N/A") var windBarW = IIF(windKt > 0, Min(Round((windKt / 170) * 100, 0), 100), 0) return { type: "text", text: '
' + '
' + '
Landfall
' + '
' + nm + '
' + '
' + '' + Upper(cat) + '' + '' + Text(yr, "####") + '' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
Wind
' + '
' + windKtF + ' kt
' + '
' + windMphF + ' mph
' + '
' + '
' + '
Pressure
' + '
' + presF + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
Landfall Intensity
' + '
' + '
' + '' + windKtF + ' kt' + '
' + '
' + dt + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
NOAA NHC HURDAT2
' + '
' + '
' }

expressionInfos.name: segment_popup
expressionInfos.title: Storm Details
expressionInfos.expression:
// Atlantic Hurricane Track Segment Popup // Paste as: Arcade Expression Content Element in AGOL Map Viewer // === EXTRACT === var nm = DefaultValue($feature.name, "UNNAMED") var yr = $feature.year var dt = DefaultValue($feature.datetime, "") var status = DefaultValue($feature.status, "") var catNum = DefaultValue($feature.category_num, -1) var cat = DefaultValue($feature.category, "Unknown") var windKt = DefaultValue($feature.wind_kt, 0) var windMph = DefaultValue($feature.wind_mph, 0) var presMb = DefaultValue($feature.pressure_mb, 0) var isLandfall = DefaultValue($feature.is_landfall, 0) var peakCatNum = DefaultValue($feature.peak_category_num, -1) var peakCat = DefaultValue($feature.peak_category, "Unknown") var segNum = DefaultValue($feature.segment_num, 0) var stormId = DefaultValue($feature.storm_id, "") // === COMPUTE === var headerBg = IIF(catNum >= 5, "#7f0000", IIF(catNum >= 4, "#b71c1c", IIF(catNum >= 3, "#d84315", IIF(catNum >= 2, "#e65100", IIF(catNum >= 1, "#00695c", IIF(catNum >= 0, "#1565C0", "#546e7a")))))) var windBarW = IIF(windKt > 0, Min(Round((windKt / 170) * 100, 0), 100), 0) var windClr = IIF(catNum >= 5, "#7f0000", IIF(catNum >= 4, "#b71c1c", IIF(catNum >= 3, "#d84315", IIF(catNum >= 2, "#e65100", IIF(catNum >= 1, "#00695c", IIF(catNum >= 0, "#1565C0", "#546e7a")))))) var peakClr = IIF(peakCatNum >= 5, "#7f0000", IIF(peakCatNum >= 4, "#b71c1c", IIF(peakCatNum >= 3, "#d84315", IIF(peakCatNum >= 2, "#e65100", IIF(peakCatNum >= 1, "#00695c", IIF(peakCatNum >= 0, "#1565C0", "#546e7a")))))) var statusLabel = IIF(status == "HU", "Hurricane", IIF(status == "TS", "Tropical Storm", IIF(status == "TD", "Tropical Dep.", IIF(status == "EX", "Extratropical", IIF(status == "SS", "Subtrop. Storm", IIF(status == "SD", "Subtrop. Dep.", status)))))) // === FORMAT === var windKtF = Text(windKt, "#,###") var windMphF = Text(windMph, "#,###") var presF = IIF(presMb > 0 && presMb < 9999, Text(presMb, "#,###") + " mb", "N/A") // === RENDER === return { type: "text", text: '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + nm + '
' + '
' + Text(yr, "####") + ' Atlantic Season
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + windKtF + '
' + '
knots
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '' + Upper(cat) + '' + IIF(isLandfall == 1, 'LANDFALL', '') + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
Wind
' + '
' + windMphF + ' mph
' + '
' + '
' + '
Pressure
' + '
' + presF + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
Status
' + '
' + statusLabel + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
Wind Intensity Scale
' + '
' + '
' + IIF(windKt > 0, '' + windKtF + ' kt / ' + windMphF + ' mph', '') + '
' + '
' + 'TDTS 34H1 64H2 83H3 96H4 113H5 137+' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
Storm Peak
' + '
' + peakCat + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
Observation
' + '
' + dt + '
' + '
Segment ' + segNum + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
NOAA National Hurricane Center HURDAT2 • ' + stormId + '
' + '
' + '
' }
